title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions!
